title: Project Executive (HR Management)
description:
Job Overview:
We are seeking a detail-oriented Project Executive to support and oversee the delivery of task-based outsourcing and business process operations for multiple clients. The role involves coordinating daily operations, monitoring project performance, supporting workforce deployment, and ensuring accurate reporting, billing, and compliance.

Key Responsibilities

  • Oversee day-to-day operations across task-based outsourcing, projects, and BPO engagements, ensuring timely and high-quality delivery

  • Act as the primary point of contact for internal and external stakeholders, managing expectations and driving alignment

  • Allocate resources, schedule tasks, and monitor performance to meet client and business requirements

  • Identify operational gaps, streamline processes, and implement improvements to enhance efficiency and productivity

  • Ensure quality standards are met, addressing issues with corrective and preventive actions

  • Support workforce planning, recruitment, onboarding, and deployment of project staff

  • Manage vendor relationships to ensure timely, cost-effective service delivery

  • Drive employee engagement and retention initiatives within project teams

  • Ensure compliance with employment regulations, safety standards, and company policies

  • Prepare and analyse operational and KPI reports, presenting insights and recommendations to senior management

Note: Responsibilities may evolve based on business needs.


Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Business Administration, Human Resources, or a related field

  • Minimum 2 years’ experience in project coordination, BPO, or administrative/operations support

  • Strong organisational, communication, and problem-solving skills

  • Excellent stakeholder management and interpersonal skills, with a strong sense of ownership and work discipline

  • Comfortable working in a fast-paced SME environment and managing multiple priorities

  • Detail-oriented with the ability to juggle tasks without losing sight of deadlines

  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)

  • CEI certification or working knowledge of Singapore employment laws and guidelines is an advantage

postedCompany.description:
APBA TG Human Resource Pte Ltd

(a wholly owned subsidiary of the TG Group)


TG Group (“TG”) is a global workforce solutions provider with an international reach in over 50 markets across the globe. Headquartered in Singapore with Shanghai Foreign Service (Group) Co Ltd ("FSG") as a strategic shareholder, TG delivers a comprehensive suite of innovative human capital solutions to help our clients achieve greater business success.

TG adopts a future-centric approach where we aspire to be at the forefront of the evolution of the future of work. We believe that human capital is the greatest asset to any institution. With a wealth of experience in the Human Resources (HR) industry, we combine our international expertise and local know-how to deliver bespoke and innovative workforce solutions.

Our diverse portfolio of client-centric workforce solutions includes Contingent Workforce Management (CWM), Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Permanent Placements, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), Professional Employer Organisation (PEO), and Payroll Process Outsourcing (PPO).
postedCompany.name: APBA TG HUMAN RESOURCE PTE. LTD.
